name: Aeon-Stream Glider
oracle_text:
Alt-Mode (Hydro-Skiff) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 3/1 and it gains flying. Activate only as a sorcery.
Whenever ~ attacks, if it is in Alt-Mode, energize.
flavor_text: In the slipstream of high-velocity combat, form is everything.
design_notes: Designed for the UR (High-Speed Ignition) archetype. This card provides tempo by offering an evasive Alt-Mode that bypasses blockers, while its second ability rewards the player for utilizing that form by generating Energon tokens. It fits the 'tempo/efficiency' theme of UR by turning a standard combat creature into a resource engine through tactical shifts.
